incidents.email_preview:
URGENT: Your account has been suspended!
    
    Dear Customer,
    
    We noticed unusual activity in your bank account. Your account will be terminated 
    within 24 hours unless you verify your identity immediately.
    
    Click here to verify: http://suspicious-link.com/verify
    Enter your password and credit card to confirm.
    
    Best regards,
    Security Team

URGENT: Your bank account has been suspended!

Dear Customer,

We noticed unusual activity. Click here to verify: http://phishing.com/verify
Enter your password immediately to restore access.

Security Team
URGENT: Your PayPal account has been suspended! Click here to verify: http://paypa1-secure.com/verify or your account will be closed permanently!

URGENT SECURITY ALERT!
        
        Your bank account has been compromised. Immediate action required!
        
        Click here to verify your identity: http://secure-bank-verify.com/login
        
        If you don't verify within 24 hours, your account will be permanently suspended.
        
        Best regards,
        Security Team

Hi Team,
        
        Just a reminder that our weekly standup is tomorrow at 10am.
        Please review the sprint backlog before the meeting.
        
        Thanks,
        John

URGENT: Your account has been compromised! Click http://phishing-site.com to verify now!
URGENT: Your account has been locked! Click http://verify-now.com to unlock it immediately!

From: billing@spotify.com
Subject: Your subscription renewal confirmation

Your Spotify Premium subscription has been renewed. Your next billing date is January 14, 2026. Thank you for being a Premium member!

From: service@paypa1-secure.com
Subject: Your PayPal account is limited

We noticed unusual login activity on your PayPal account. To restore full access, please confirm your information by clicking here: http://paypal-verify.xyz/confirm. Failure to verify within 48 hours will result in account suspension.

From: admin@microsoft365-support.net
Subject: Microsoft 365: Password Expiration Notice

Your Microsoft 365 password will expire in 24 hours. To avoid service interruption, please update your password immediately: http://microsoft365-update.com/password. This is an automated message from IT Security.

From: orders@amazon-shipping.info
Subject: Amazon: Confirm your order #AMZ-9847261

We couldn't process your recent order due to payment issues. Please update your payment method within 12 hours to avoid order cancellation: http://amazon-verify-payment.com/update

From: manager@company.com
Subject: Your weekly project update

Hi team, Here's our weekly progress update. We completed 3 major milestones this week. Please review the attached report and let me know if you have questions. Best regards, John

From: colleague@company.com
Subject: Meeting notes from yesterday's call

Hi, As discussed in yesterday's meeting, here are the action items: 1. Complete the quarterly report by Friday 2. Schedule follow-up with the client 3. Review the budget proposal. Let me know if anything needs clarification.

From: refunds@irs-taxrefund.gov.com
Subject: IRS Tax Refund Notification

You are eligible for a tax refund of $3,847.00. To claim your refund, please submit your banking information through our secure portal: http://irs-refund-claim.com/submit

From: security-alert@bankofamerica-verify.com
Subject: URGENT: Your account has been compromised

Dear Customer, We have detected suspicious activity on your account. Your account has been temporarily suspended. Please click the link below to verify your identity immediately or your account will be permanently closed within 24 hours. Verify Now: http://secure-bankofamerica-login.com/verify

From: newsletter@techcompany.com
Subject: Monthly newsletter - December Edition

Welcome to our December newsletter! This month we're featuring: New product announcements, customer success stories, and upcoming webinars. Click to read more on our website.

From: noreply@apple-id-security.com
Subject: Apple ID: Unusual Sign-in Detected

Someone tried to sign into your Apple ID from a new device. If this wasn't you, please secure your account immediately: http://apple-id-verify.net/secure
